name: Bane Ammunition (Lesser)
description:
Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

Monster hunters favor bane ammunition that contains a capsule of reagents tailored to a particular type of creature—aberration, animal, beast, dragon, fey, giant, ooze, or both fungus and plant. Each type requires a different formula. When activated bane ammunition hits a target that has a trait matching the selected type, it takes ] damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.
